response.step_by_step_log: 1. 00:00-04:15: Instrumental/intro sequence. 2. 04:16: Vocal performance of 'Gacha×Gacha ADVENTURE!' begins. 3. Searched for the song to find the composer and official lyrics. Found composer OrcaNyan and full lyrics (Kanji/Kana). 4. Created a translation of the lyrics.
response.global_summary: A video of Raora Panthera's 3D debut featuring an introductory scene followed by the vocal performance of her original song 'Gacha×Gacha ADVENTURE!'.

scenes.description: Raora Panthera in a 3D environment with guests, performing a skit. Background music is an instrumental version of her song.
Raora Panthera performs her original song 'Gacha×Gacha ADVENTURE!' on stage.
scenes.reference_lyrics_en:
(Yes! Yes! Yes! Pon! Pon!)(Yes! Yes! Yes! Pon! Pon!)(Gacha, Gacha, RAOOOOO!!)
Come on, come on, it's a treasure hunt
"What kind of prey will we find today?"
Hey, hey, everyone, together
"Let's go on a fun adventure!"
(Un! Due! Tre!)
Once you're hooked, you can't get out~
Food, stuffed animals, Pizza, and Pasta,
An enchanting labyrinth packed with everything
The excitement won't stop (Proviamo!)
Frustrated because I can almost get it but can't,
In the crane game, "Nnya~, seriously!"
There's no way I'm going to give up and retire like this!
"Aim to complete it!"
Come on, it's useless even if you stop it again♪
Déjà vu repeating once more
Don't tell me to give up (;ω;)
It's the third time's the charm, so no problem
My overflowing feelings won't stop
Is this my true calling!?
It's filled with fun things, even from here on out
"Yes, ready, go!"
Gacha×GachaADVENTURE!
(Gacha... Gacha... Gacha... Gacha...)
"Game, restart!"
Spin it around and around
"No way... I can't stop!"
Until I get the prey I'm aiming for
"Please... just one more time!"
(Bim bum bam!)
Once you're on the beat, you can't stop~
Rhythm games are easy too
If you get the Combo and Fever perfect, it's a perfect Groove!
If you slip up, it's game over (Andiamo!)
Race game with the engine full throttle,
A hot, intense battle!
"Go, go, go, go!"
If you make a lead at the corner,
Aim for 1st place!
Come on, even if it's one more time, today is the end
I start to say one more time and stop
The fun feeling makes my chest tighten
Hey, hey, do I really have to say bye-bye?
I don't want to go home yet
Could this be love!?
The days ahead, filled with excitement,
"Let's go on an adventure together!"
Come on, it's useless even if you stop it again♪
Déjà vu repeating once more
Don't tell me to give up (;ω;)
Because I can challenge as many times as I want, no problem
My overflowing feelings won't stop
This is my true calling!!
I can redo it as many times as I want, that's life
(Everyone together!)
Gacha×GachaADVENTURE!
(Yes! Yes! Yes! Pon! Pon!)(Yes! Yes! Yes! Pon! Pon!)(Gacha, Gacha, RAOOOOO!!)
"Let's go on an adventure together again! Ciao ciao♪"",reference_lyrics_og:
